description: A customer's credit card on file has expired, and they need to update it for their recurring payments.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and their current payment method.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the customer's account and sees the expired card on file.

nodes.task_description: Securely collect the new credit card information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately captures the new card number, expiration date, and CVV.

nodes.task_description: Update the recurring payment plan with the new card details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the payment information.
